description.en: Adds hourly wages for workers with skill-based pricing and configurable rates.
description.de: Fügt stündliche Löhne für Arbeiter mit fähigkeitsbasierten Preisen und konfigurierbaren Sätzen hinzu.
description.fr: Ajoute des salaires horaires pour les ouvriers avec tarification basée sur les compétences et taux configurables.
description.pl: Dodaje godzinowe stawki dla pracowników z cenami opartymi na umiejętnościach i konfigurowalnymi stawkami.
description.es: Añade salarios por hora para trabajadores con precios basados en habilidades y tarifas configurables.
description.it: Aggiunge salari orari per operai con prezzi basati su abilità e tariffe configurabili.
description.cz: Přidává hodinové mzdy pro pracovníky s cenami založenými na dovednostech a konfigurovatelnými sazbami.
description.br: Adiciona salários por hora para trabalhadores com preços baseados em habilidades e taxas configuráveis.
description.uk: Додає погодинну оплату працівникам з ціною на основі навичок та настроюваними ставками.
description.ru: Добавляет почасовую оплату работникам с ценами на основе навыков и настраиваемыми ставками.

text.name: wc_enabled_long
text.en: Enable or disable the worker costs mod
text.fr: Activer ou désactiver le module de coûts des ouvriers
text.pl: Włącz lub wyłącz mod kosztów pracowników
text.es: Activar o desactivar el módulo de costos de trabajadores
text.it: Attiva o disattiva il modulo dei costi degli operai
text.cz: Povolit nebo zakázat mod nákladů na pracovníky
text.br: Ativar ou desativar o mod de custos de trabalhadores
text.uk: Увімкнути або вимкнути мод витрат на працівників
text.ru: Включить или выключить мод расходов на работников
text.da: Aktivér eller deaktiver mod’en for medarbejderomkostninger

text.name: wc_costmode_long
text.en: Choose cost calculation: hourly or per hectare
text.de: Wählen Sie die Kostenberechnung: stündlich oder pro Hektar
text.fr: Choisissez le calcul des coûts : horaire ou par hectare
text.pl: Wybierz obliczanie kosztów: godzinowe lub za hektar
text.es: Elegir cálculo de costos: por hora o por hectárea
text.it: Scegli calcolo costi: orario o per ettaro
text.cz: Vyberte výpočet nákladů: hodinový nebo na hektar
text.br: Escolher cálculo de custos: por hora ou por hectare
text.uk: Виберіть розрахунок витрат: погодинно або за гектар
text.ru: Выбрать расчет расходов: почасово или за гектар
text.da: Vælg beregningsmetode for omkostninger: timebaseret eller pr. hektar

text.name: wc_difficulty_long
text.en: Set base wage rate: Low=$15/h, Medium=$25/h, High=$40/h
text.fr: Définir le taux de salaire de base : Bas=15$/h, Moyen=25$/h, Élevé=40$/h
text.pl: Ustaw podstawową stawkę: Niska=15$/h, Średnia=25$/h, Wysoka=40$/h
text.es: Establecer tasa salarial base: Baja=15$/h, Media=25$/h, Alta=40$/h
text.it: Imposta tariffa base: Bassa=15$/h, Media=25$/h, Alta=40$/h
text.cz: Nastavit základní sazbu: Nízká=15$/h, Střední=25$/h, Vysoká=40$/h
text.br: Definir taxa salarial base: Baixa=15$/h, Média=25$/h, Alta=40$/h
text.uk: Встановити базову ставку: Низька=15$/год, Середня=25$/год, Висока=40$/год
text.ru: Установить базовую ставку: Низкая=15$/ч, Средняя=25$/ч, Высокая=40$/ч

text.name: wc_notifications_long
text.fr: Activer/désactiver les notifications de paiement des salaires
text.es: Activar/desactivar notificaciones de pago de salarios
text.br: Ativar/desativar notificações de pagamento de salários
text.uk: Увімкнути/вимкнути сповіщення про виплату заробітної плати
text.ru: Включить/выключить уведомления о выплате заработной платы

text.name: wc_customrate_long
text.en: Set custom wage rate (0 = use wage level setting)
text.fr: Définir le taux de salaire personnalisé (0 = utiliser le niveau de salaire)
text.pl: Ustaw niestandardową stawkę (0 = użyj ustawienia poziomu płac)
text.es: Establecer tasa salarial personalizada (0 = usar configuración de nivel)
text.it: Imposta tariffa salariale personalizzata (0 = usa impostazione livello)
text.cz: Nastavit vlastní mzdovou sazbu (0 = použít nastavení úrovně)
text.br: Definir taxa salarial personalizada (0 = usar configuração de nível)
text.uk: Встановити власну ставку оплати (0 = використовувати налаштування рівня)
text.ru: Установить пользовательскую ставку оплаты (0 = использовать настройку уровня)

text.name: wc_hint_open_manager
text.en: Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.de: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.fr: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.pl: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.es: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.it: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.cz: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.br: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.uk: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.ru: [EN] Press Accept to open the full Worker Costs manager.
text.da: Tryk på Acceptér for at åbne den fulde styring

text.name: wc_about_payment_note
text.en: Payments run on real time — game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.de: Zahlungen laufen in Echtzeit — die Spielgeschwindigkeit hat keinen Einfluss auf die Abrechnung.
text.fr: Les paiements s'effectuent en temps réel — la vitesse du jeu n'affecte pas la facturation.
text.es: Los pagos se ejecutan en tiempo real — la velocidad del juego no afecta la facturación.
text.pl: [EN] Payments run on real time — game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.it: [EN] Payments run on real time — game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.cz: [EN] Payments run on real time — game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.br: [EN] Payments run on real time — game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.uk: [EN] Payments run on real time — game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.ru: [EN] Payments run on real time — game speed does not affect billing. Deductions happen silently in the background every interval.
text.da: Betalinger sker i realtid — spilhastigheden påvirker ikke opkrævningen. Fradrag foretages automatisk i baggrunden ved hvert interval.

text.name: wc_about_body
text.en:
Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.de: Realistische Arbeiterkosten ersetzt das Standard-Arbeiterlohnsystem durch ein Abrechnungsmodell auf Basis von Echtzeit.
text.fr: Coûts Réalistes des Ouvriers remplace le système de salaire par défaut par un modèle de facturation basé sur le temps réel.
text.es: Costos Realistas de Trabajadores reemplaza el sistema de pago de trabajadores predeterminado con un modelo de facturación basado en tiempo real.
text.pl:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.it:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.cz:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.br:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.uk:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.ru:
[EN] Realistic Worker Costs replaces the default worker pay system with a billing model based on real time.
Workers are charged on a fixed schedule regardless of game speed. Each active AI worker costs money every payment interval.
HOURLY MODE A fixed rate per worker per hour. Charges scale with how many workers are active and how long they work.
PER-HECTARE MODE Workers are charged based on area worked. The per-hectare rate scales with your Wage Level setting.
WAGE SETTINGS Adjust Cost Mode, Wage Level, and toggle notifications in the Wage Settings tab. Use Reset to restore defaults.
WORKER STATS The Worker Stats tab shows a live breakdown of costs per worker for the current billing interval.
This mod is multiplayer compatible. Settings are saved per save game.
text.da:
Realistic Worker Costs erstatter standardlønssystemet for medarbejdere med en faktureringsmodel baseret på realtid.
Medarbejdere opkræves efter en fast tidsplan uanset spillets hastighed. Hver aktiv AI-medarbejder koster penge ved hvert betalingsinterval.
TIMEBASERET TILSTAND En fast sats pr. medarbejder pr. time. Omkostningerne skalerer efter, hvor mange medarbejdere der er aktive, og hvor længe de arbejder.
PR. HEKTAR-TILSTAND Medarbejdere opkræves baseret på det bearbejdede areal. Satsen pr. hektar skalerer med din indstilling for lønniveau.
LØNINDSTILLINGER Juster omkostningstilstand, lønniveau, og slå notifikationer til eller fra i fanen Lønindstillinger. Brug Nulstil for at gendanne standardindstillingerne.
MEDARBEJDERSTATISTIK Fanen Medarbejderstatistik viser en live oversigt over omkostninger pr. medarbejder for det aktuelle betalingsinterval.
Denne mod er kompatibel med multiplayer. Indstillinger gemmes pr. savegame.

text.name: wc_menu_description
text.en: Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.de: Überwachen Sie Ihre Arbeitskosten und den Abrechnungsstatus auf einen Blick.
text.fr: Surveillez vos coûts de main-d'oeuvre d'un coup d'oeil. Ouvrez le Gestionnaire pour les statistiques en direct.
text.es: Supervise los costos de sus trabajadores de un vistazo. Abra el Administrador para estadísticas en vivo.
text.pl: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.it: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.cz: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.br: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.uk: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.ru: [EN] Monitor your worker costs and billing status at a glance. Open the Worker Manager for live stats, detailed breakdowns, and full settings control.
text.da: Få et hurtigt overblik over dine medarbejderomkostninger og betalingsstatus. Åbn medarbejderstyringen for live statistik, detaljerede oversigter og fuld kontrol over indstillingerne

text.name: wc_help_body
text.en:
PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.de:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.fr:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.pl:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.es:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.it:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.cz:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.br:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.uk:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.ru:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Hourly — pay a fixed rate per worker per real-time hour. Per Hectare — pay based on area worked.
COMPENSATION TIER Low = $15 per worker per hour Medium = $25 per worker per hour High = $40 per worker per hour
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes, independent of game speed.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.da:
BETALINGSSTRATEGI Timebaseret — betal en fast sats pr. medarbejder pr. realtidstime. Pr. hektar — betal baseret på det bearbejdede areal.
KOMPENSATIONSNIVEAU Lav = $15 pr. medarbejder pr. time Mellem = $25 pr. medarbejder pr. time Høj = $40 pr. medarbejder pr. time
BETALINGER Fratrækkes hvert 5. realtidsminut, uafhængigt af spillets hastighed. Satsforhåndsvisningen på denne side viser den præcise opkrævning pr. betalingsinterval.
Brug Nulstil for at gendanne alle indstillinger til standardværdierne.

text.name: wc_help_body_ha
text.en:
PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.de:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.fr:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.pl:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.es:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.it:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.cz:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.br:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.uk:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.ru:
[EN] PAYMENT STRATEGY Per Hectare — workers are billed per hectare of field worked during each payment interval.
COMPENSATION TIER (per hectare) Low = $15 per hectare worked Medium = $25 per hectare worked High = $40 per hectare worked
PAYMENTS Deducted every 30 real-time minutes based on area worked. Workers not currently active have no charge for that interval.
Use Reset to restore all settings to their defaults.
text.da:
BETALINGSSTRATEGI Pr. hektar — medarbejdere opkræves pr. hektar bearbejdet mark i hvert betalingsinterval.
KOMPENSATIONSNIVEAU (pr. hektar) Lav = $15 pr. hektar bearbejdet Mellem = $25 pr. hektar bearbejdet Høj = $40 pr. hektar bearbejdet
BETALINGER Fratrækkes hvert 5. realtidsminut baseret på bearbejdet areal. Medarbejdere, der ikke er aktive, opkræves ikke for det pågældende interval.
Brug Nulstil for at gendanne alle indstillinger til standardværdierne.
